mapper.select:
select id, meal_plan_id, customer_id, customer_name, phone, order_id, parent_package_id, child_package_id, status, fail_reason, meat_required_count, veg_required_count, include_soup, include_rice, create_by, update_by, deleted, create_time, update_time from meal_plan_customer
deleted = 0
and meal_plan_id = #{criteria.mealPlanId}
and customer_name like concat('%', #{criteria.customerName}, '%')
and phone like concat('%', #{criteria.phone}, '%')
and status = #{criteria.status}
order by id asc

select id, meal_plan_id, customer_id, customer_name, phone, order_id, parent_package_id, child_package_id, status, fail_reason, meat_required_count, veg_required_count, include_soup, include_rice, create_by, update_by, deleted, create_time, update_time from meal_plan_customer where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

select mpc.id, mpc.meal_plan_id, mpc.customer_id, mpc.customer_name, mpc.phone, cp.customer_code, mpc.order_id, mpc.parent_package_id, mpc.child_package_id, mpc.status, mpc.fail_reason, mpc.meat_required_count, mpc.veg_required_count, mpc.include_soup, mpc.include_rice, mpc.create_by, mpc.update_by, mpc.deleted, mpc.create_time, mpc.update_time from meal_plan_customer mpc left join customer_profile cp on mpc.customer_id = cp.id where mpc.meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and mpc.deleted = 0 order by mpc.id asc

select pp.package_code, pp.package_name, count(mpc.id) as meal_count from meal_plan mp join meal_plan_customer mpc on mp.id = mpc.meal_plan_id join parent_package pp on mpc.parent_package_id = pp.id where mp.record_date = #{date} and mp.deleted = 0 and mpc.deleted = 0 group by pp.id, pp.package_code, pp.package_name order by meal_count desc
